assessment_roll.publisher: NYC Department of Finance via NYC Open Data
assessment_roll.update_cadence: annual roll, periodic corrections — confirm at pull
assessment_roll.vintage: PENDING — record roll year and update date at retrieval

value_field_definitions.status: PENDING Phase 2 Step 2 — the value-field minefield
value_field_definitions.note: The roll carries ~50 value columns. Document which single field is the comparison basis and confirm all comps use the same field and tax class. Likely DOF final MARKET VALUE (not actual assessed, not transitional assessed). MUST be confirmed against DOF class 4 methodology, not a summary.
value_field_definitions.candidate_comparison_field: final market value (TBD exact column name from API introspection)

assessment_ratio.use: SIGNAL — assessment-ratio deviation, descriptive only, not a verdict
assessment_ratio.source: NYC DOF — Determining Your Assessed Value
assessment_ratio.confidence: high (multiple secondary sources trace to DOF); re-cite directly to DOF page

tax_rate.note: Confirmed ~10.848% via FY2026 sources citing nyc.gov. LOCK exact figure against official DOF tax-rate table before display. Used only to multiply a published taxable value into a displayed tax bill.

reassessment_cycle.note: Class 4 has no assessment-increase cap; assessments can move to full market value in a single year. Cite DOF.

ret_transfer_tax.status: PENDING — cite NYC RPTT + NY State RETT
ret_transfer_tax.relevance: supports the 'new owner paid less than assessed' use case

appeal_process.layer: CONTEXT only (the user's next step, never advice to take it)

rpie_note.fact: Real Property Income and Expense (RPIE) data — source of the assessor's NOI — is NOT published per parcel.
rpie_note.consequence: RUNG 3 implied cap rate is USER-INPUT NOI ONLY. Cannot be auto-pulled. This dependency keeps RUNG 3 honest.

known_data_caveats: Condo billing-lot aggregation in PLUTO — handle explicitly, route exclusions with reason codes
Transitional assessment phase-in for class 4 — affects value-field choice
YearBuilt correction history in PLUTO — demote to display-only if fill rate weak
Open-data vintage lag vs official DOF lookup — disclose any lag found in Phase 2 ground-truth check

address_to_bbl.status: needed for Tier 0 address input resolution
